method: Heat the broiler on high. broil the eggs, still on the center rack of the oven, until the center is just set, about 2 minutes. remove from the ov en immediately—the eggs will continue to set. candied bacon this maple syrup-coated, brown sugar- crusted bacon is the perfect salty-sweet marriage.
